---
title: "Andrés André"
subtitle: |
  PhD Candidate in Mechanical Engineering \
  Universidad del Norte \
  Barranquilla, Colombia
description-meta: "Andrés André Camargo Bertel, PhD Candidate in Mechanical Engineering at Universidad del Norte. Energy systems modeling, renewable energy integration, and transport and industrial decarbonization."
image: "files/profile/andres-camargo.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: custom
css: assets/index.css
format:
  html:
    link-external-icon: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .quarto-title-block { display: none; }
          </style>

listing:
  - id: latest-papers
    contents: posts
    include:
      categories: [paper]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    max-items: 2
    page-size: 2
    image-height: "220px"
    fields: [image, title]
    sort:
      - "date desc"
  - id: recent-posts
    contents:
      - posts
    exclude:
      categories: [paper]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    max-items: 3
    page-size: 3
    image-height: "180px"
    fields: [image, date, title]
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

::: {.background-frame .alt-background}
::: {.content-block}

<div style="height: 40px;"></div>

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5 .hero-left}

[![](files/profile/andres-camargo.jpg){width=90% fig-align="center"}](bio.qmd)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7 .hero-right}

<p align="center" style="font-size:2rem; font-weight:bold;">Andrés André Camargo Bertel</p>

<p align="center" style="font-size:1.4rem;">
PhD Candidate in Mechanical Engineering\
Universidad del Norte\
Barranquilla, Colombia\
Email: camargoaa@uninorte.edu.co
</p>

::: {.button}
[Full Bio](bio.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

<p align="center" style="font-size:1.6rem;">
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=RTRoJm0AAAAJ" target="_blank" style="color:#05336B;" title="Google Scholar"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i></a>&ensp;
<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8192-8254" target="_blank" style="color:#05336B;" title="ORCID"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i></a>&ensp;
<a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Andres-Camargo-Bertel" target="_blank" style="color:#05336B;" title="ResearchGate"><i class="ai ai-researchgate"></i></a>&ensp;
<a href="https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=59319653100" target="_blank" style="color:#05336B;" title="Scopus"><i class="ai ai-scopus"></i></a>&ensp;
<a href="https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/GQB-3417-2022" target="_blank" style="color:#05336B;" title="Web of Science"><i class="ai ai-clarivate"></i></a>&ensp;
<a href="https://github.com/camargo-aa" target="_blank" style="color:#05336B;" title="GitHub"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></a>&ensp;
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrés-andré-camargo-bertel-91916319b" target="_blank" style="color:#05336B;" title="LinkedIn"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i></a>
</p>

:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.background-frame}
::: {.content-block}

<p align="center" style="font-size:2rem; font-weight:bold;">Latest Papers</p>

:::{#latest-papers}
:::

::: {.button}
[More papers](publications.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.background-frame .alt-background}
::: {.content-block}

<p align="center" style="font-size:2rem; font-weight:bold;">Recent News</p>

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

::: {.button}
[More news](posts.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::
